techstart.title: TechStart Platform
techstart.description: Full-stack project management and analytics platform built for a Romanian startup. Real-time collaboration, custom reporting dashboard, and team workspaces — from 0 to production in 8 weeks.
techstart.challenge: Design a multi-tenant architecture supporting 50+ isolated teams with real-time updates and a sub-200ms dashboard load time under concurrent load.

nordshop.title: NordShop
nordshop.description: High-converting online store for a Nordic market — custom Stripe integration, advanced product filtering, multi-currency, and a mobile-first checkout that lifted conversions by 40%.

buildflow.title: BuildFlow Dashboard
buildflow.description: Project management dashboard with real-time updates, team workspaces, Gantt charts, and advanced analytics — built for a German B2B SaaS startup.

medconnect.title: MedConnect API
medconnect.description: HIPAA-compliant REST API for a healthcare provider — patient records, appointment scheduling, real-time notifications, and secure third-party integrations.

greenmarket.title: GreenMarket
greenmarket.description: B2C + B2B sustainable goods marketplace with Sanity CMS, custom product configurator, wholesale pricing tiers, and a 98 Lighthouse score.

lumina.title: Lumina Agency
lumina.description: Award-quality agency website with scroll-driven animations, video backgrounds, multilingual support, and a sub-1s LCP on mobile.
